tasks.title: Analyze existing AI Tutor and learning data modules
tasks.description: Review current AI Tutor implementation in packages/ai-tutor and learning data sources in packages/learning-engine and packages/storage. tasks.title: Design Proactive Message Generation Engine
tasks.description: Design the logic and rules for generating proactive messages based on user data such as study plan, progress, mistakes, vocabulary, streaks, and inactivity. Define message categories, triggers, priorities, and example message templates. Specify how to avoid message spamming and ensure contextual relevance.
acceptanceCriteria: Detailed design document with message categories, triggers, and templates
Rules for message frequency and user annoyance prevention
Mapping of user data inputs to message triggers
tasks.expectedResult: A design specification document for the proactive message generation engine with clear rules and examples.

outputPlan.description: Design document for proactive message generation engine

metadata.inputContext: Data analysis document from previous task
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Defines the core logic for proactive AI Tutor messaging

tasks.title: Design User Settings and Configuration UI for Proactive AI Tutor
tasks.description: Design the user interface and data model for configuring proactive AI Tutor settings including enabling/disabling, reminder frequency, tutor tone, preferred study time, notification channels, weak skill priority, automation level, and exercise suggestion preferences. Specify UI components and integration points in settings pages.
acceptanceCriteria: UI mockups or wireframes for settings page additions
Data model schema for storing user settings
Integration plan for settings persistence and retrieval
tasks.expectedResult: A design document and UI mockups for proactive AI Tutor user settings and configuration.

outputPlan.description: Design document and UI mockups for proactive AI Tutor settings

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables user customization of proactive AI Tutor behavior

tasks.title: Design UI Integration Points for Proactive AI Tutor Messages
tasks.description: Design how and where proactive AI Tutor messages will be displayed in the app: dashboard, header chat icon, messenger popup, extension popup, text selection popup, after lesson completion, after mistakes, inactivity alerts, and weekly progress reviews. tasks.title: Create Proactive Message Data Model and Storage Schema
tasks.description: Define TypeScript types and IndexedDB/localStorage schemas for storing proactive messages, message states (read, dismissed, snoozed), and user settings. Implement data access services for CRUD operations on proactive messages and settings.
acceptanceCriteria: TypeScript interfaces for messages and settings
Storage schema definitions for IndexedDB and localStorage
Data service modules with unit tests for message and settings CRUD
tasks.expectedResult: Robust data model and storage layer for proactive AI Tutor messages and settings with passing tests.

outputPlan.description: TypeScript types for proactive messages and settings
Data access service for proactive messages and settings
Unit tests for proactive message storage service

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides persistent storage for proactive messages and user preferences

tasks.title: Implement Proactive Message Generation Engine Module
tasks.description: Implement the proactive message generation engine as a service module in packages/ai-tutor. acceptanceCriteria: Service module generates messages based on input data
Respects user settings for frequency and quiet hours
Includes unit tests covering message generation scenarios

Browser notifications sent when enabled in settings
Unit tests verify event emission and notification behavior

Notification service for proactive messages
Unit tests for event bus
